text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's sold out here too... This is the fifth bookstore
already!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Every time a new volume comes out, the series
just gets more and more popular...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what should I do? It's almost time for
training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's 2.2 kilometers to the bookstore at the next
station over... If I use the Horsegirl lane, it should only
take two minutes...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I really hope they have it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Mejiro Dober fails to find the manga
she wants and continues her search instead of
coming to practice.
